@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "open-webui-363-feat-whisper-integration",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "open-webui: feat: whisper integration",
+    "description": "feat: whisper integration. Requested by 10+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current open-webui deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your open-webui version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n open-webui -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-webui\nhelm list -n open-webui 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working open-webui installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review open-webui configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant open-webui configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n open-webui -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-webui\nkubectl get configmap -n open-webui -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=open-webui\n```\nThe current voice input implementation is only supported by Safari. Also, it is highly unreliable due to constant typos and lack of bilingual or multilingual support."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for feat: whisper integration",
+        "description": "The truth is that there is no simple way to set up HTTPS for a web application that does not require careful attention and expertise of the user. \"Easy\" HTTPS requires exposure to the Internet in most cases. Running a web application exposed to the internet is a serious responsibility, and it is\n```yaml\nSee \"Minimal Private Local LAN Server Example\" at https://wiki.nixos.org/wiki/Nginx for more details.\n\nFurthermore NixOS already built-in Ollama as a web service support. The amount of code to enable an Ollama service is:\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n open-webui -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-webui\nkubectl get events -n open-webui --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"feat: whisper integration\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "The truth is that there is no simple way to set up HTTPS for a web application that does not require careful attention and expertise of the user. \"Easy\" HTTPS requires exposure to the Internet in most cases.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "See \"Minimal Private Local LAN Server Example\" at https://wiki.nixos.org/wiki/Nginx for more details.\n\nFurthermore NixOS already built-in Ollama as a web service support. The amount of code to enable an Ollama service is:"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
